name: villa-vittoria
title: Tropical 6BR Pool Villa • Heart of Seminyak
description: Walk to HUT Bali Café, Made's Warung, Wild Habit Pizza, Queen's Tandoor and Frestive Market. Escape to Villa Vittoria, a spacious 6BR tropical pool villa in the heart of vibrant Seminyak. Just 5 minutes from La Favela and 1.2 km from La Plancha at Seminyak Beach, perfectly located for Bali's best restaurants, cafés and nightlife. Enjoy fast Wi-Fi, daily cleaning and optional floating breakfast.Perfect for families, friends, group holidays and special celebrations (up to 12 guests) in Bali.The spaceWelcome to Villa Vittoria , your private tropical sanctuary in the heart of Seminyak, hidden down a peaceful lane just moments from Bali’s best restaurants, cafés and nightlife.Designed for families and groups, the villa offers six spacious king bedrooms, each with its own ensuite bathroom. Four feature deep soaking bathtubs, while two upstairs suites include walk-in closets and spa-style bathrooms with separate showers and tubs.At the center of the villa, a bright open living space invites you to relax with an 86” LG 4K Smart TV, perfect for cozy movie nights. The fully equipped kitchen is ready for you or your private chef, while the Balinese-style pergola and oversized lounge sofa create the perfect setting for long tropical afternoons.Outside, enjoy your private turquoise pool with a shallow sun area ideal for cooling off, floating or playing with the kids beneath the palm trees.Each bedroom offers its own LG Smart TV, soft linens and calming tropical design for a restful stay.Start the day with floating breakfasts by the pool and end your evenings under the warm Bali sky.Walk to HUT Bali Café, Made's Warung, Wild Habit Pizza, Queen's Tandoor and Frestive Market and much more restaurants and Spa and Shops.Villa Vittoria is where unforgettable Bali moments begin.Why guests love Villa Vittoria🏝 Large private pool with sunny shallow area🛏 Six king bedrooms with ensuite bathrooms🛁 Four bathtubs for relaxing spa moments📍 Quiet lane in the heart of Seminyak🍽 Walk to res
